info.title: Stripe Sync Service
info.description:
Stripe Sync Service — manage pipelines and webhook ingress.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Summary |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /health | Health check |
| GET | /pipelines | List pipelines |
| POST | /pipelines | Create pipeline |
| GET | /pipelines/{id} | Retrieve pipeline |
| PATCH | /pipelines/{id} | Update pipeline |
| DELETE | /pipelines/{id} | Delete pipeline |
| POST | /webhooks/{pipeline_id} | Ingest a Stripe webhook event |

streams.description: Selected streams to sync. All streams synced if omitted.

sync_mode.description: How the source reads this stream. Defaults to full_refresh.

backfill_limit.description: Cap backfill to this many records, then mark the stream complete.

desired_status.description: User-controlled lifecycle state. Set via PATCH to pause, resume, or delete.

status.description: Workflow-controlled execution state. Updated by the Temporal workflow.

progress.description: Latest read-only sync progress snapshot from the engine. Updated when a bounded sync run completes and safe for dashboards to poll.

cutoff.description: Present when reason is time_limit. soft = stopped gracefully between messages; hard = forcibly interrupted a blocked operation.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds elapsed since the stream started. Always present when reason is time_limit or aborted.

state.description: Full sync state at the end of the run. source: accumulated from source_state messages; engine: updated cumulative record counts; destination: reserved. Consumers can persist this directly and pass it back on resume.

global_progress.description: Final global aggregates. Same shape as trace/progress.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds since the sync run started.

run_record_count.description: Total records synced across all streams in this run.

rows_per_second.description: Overall throughput for the entire run: run_record_count / elapsed seconds.

window_rows_per_second.description: Instantaneous throughput: total records in last window / window duration. Measures only the most recent reporting interval.

state_checkpoint_count.description: Total source_state messages observed so far in this sync run.

stream_progress.description: Per-stream end-of-sync summary. Errors only appear here, not in stream_status messages.

cumulative_record_count.description: Cumulative records synced for this stream across all runs.

records_per_second.description: Average records/sec for this stream over the run.

requests_per_second.description: Average requests/sec for this stream over the run.

errors.description: All accumulated errors for this stream during this run.

additionalProperties.description: End-of-sync summary for a single stream.

post.description: Receives a raw Stripe webhook event, verifies its signature using the pipeline's webhook secret, and enqueues it for processing by the active pipeline.

account_id.description: Stripe account ID (resolved from API if omitted)

livemode.description: Whether this is a live mode sync

base_url.description: Override the Stripe API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:12111 for stripe-mock)

webhook_url.description: URL for managed webhook endpoint registration

webhook_secret.description: Webhook signing secret (whsec_...) for signature verification

websocket.description: Enable WebSocket streaming for live events

poll_events.description: Enable events API polling for incremental sync after backfill

webhook_port.description: Port for built-in webhook HTTP listener (e.g. 4242)

revalidate_objects.description: Object types to re-fetch from Stripe API on webhook (e.g. ["subscription"])

backfill_limit.description: Max objects to backfill per stream (useful for testing)

max_concurrent_streams.description: Max streams paginating in parallel (default: 5, capped at catalog size).

rate_limit.description: Override max requests per second (default: auto-derived from API key mode — 20 live, 10 test).

ssl_ca_pem.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate for SSL verification (required for verify-ca / verify-full with a private CA)

spreadsheet_title.description: Title when creating a new spreadsheet

batch_size.description: Rows per Sheets API append call

streams.description: Per-stream checkpoint data, keyed by stream name.

global.description: Section-wide state shared across all streams.

source.description: Source connector state — cursors, backfill progress, events cursors.

streams.description: Per-stream checkpoint data, keyed by stream name.

global.description: Section-wide state shared across all streams.

destination.description: Destination connector state — reserved for future use.

streams.description: Per-stream checkpoint data, keyed by stream name.

global.description: Section-wide state shared across all streams.

engine.description: Engine-managed state — cumulative record counts, sync metadata not owned by connectors.

SyncState.description: Full sync checkpoint with separate sections for source, destination, and engine. Connectors only see their own section; the engine manages routing.
